label: Structured Output
description: Force the LLM to emit valid JSON matching the supplied schema. Retries on parse failure.

settings.name: schema
settings.label: JSON schema (string or JSON-Schema fragment)
settings.description: Goes into the system prompt verbatim — the LLM is told to match this shape exactly.

settings.name: prompt
settings.label: Prompt
settings.description: User instruction. Falls back to input.content / input.prompt / input string if blank.

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model
settings.description: Leave as 'auto' to use Smart Router. Hard-coded model IDs are discouraged.

ai.shortDescription: LLM with response_format=json_object + retry on parse failure.
ai.whenToUse: When you need a strictly-shaped JSON result (e.g. extract entities, classify with reason).
ai.examplePrompt: extract { ticker, sentiment, confidence } from this earnings transcript
ai.promptHints: Reference the parsed object via {{steps.<id>.output.<field>}}. Leave model='auto'.
